title: And Now the Spinning
description: Resource pack for Useless Reptile that changes the model and texture of wyverns
body:
Do you like the Useless Reptile mod?
Would you like blockier models for the Useless Reptile mod?

Well, do I have the pack for you.                    
With this pack, you will finally get your chance to be          shot in the face by a wyvern that is even blockier than before!

Disclaimer: any occurances of poisoning are not the responsibility of the maker of this resource pack nor the creator of the original mod.
